message:
chore: update dependency versions for crates.io publish cascade

- asupersync 0.2.5 -> 0.2.8
- sqlmodel 0.2.0 -> 0.2.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -32,16 +32,16 @@ fastmcp-server = "0.2.0"
 fastmcp-transport = "0.2.0"
 fastmcp-protocol = "0.2.0"
 
-asupersync = { version = "0.2.5", features = ["tls-webpki-roots"] }
-
-sqlmodel = "0.2.0"
-sqlmodel-core = "0.2.0"
-sqlmodel-query = "0.2.0"
-sqlmodel-schema = "0.2.0"
-sqlmodel-session = "0.2.0"
-sqlmodel-pool = "0.2.0"
-sqlmodel-sqlite = "0.2.0"
-sqlmodel-frankensqlite = "0.2.0"
+asupersync = { version = "0.2.8", features = ["tls-webpki-roots"] }
+
+sqlmodel = "0.2.1"
+sqlmodel-core = "0.2.1"
+sqlmodel-query = "0.2.1"
+sqlmodel-schema = "0.2.1"
+sqlmodel-session = "0.2.1"
+sqlmodel-pool = "0.2.1"
+sqlmodel-sqlite = "0.2.1"
+sqlmodel-frankensqlite = "0.2.1"
 
 ftui = "0.2.1"
 ftui-runtime = { version = "0.2.1", features = ["native-backend"] }
